articles.title: 12 tons of KitKat bars stolen in chocolaty heist in Europe, Nestle says - CBS News
articles.description: The truck, transporting 413,793 KitKat bars, was stolen during transit in Europe, Nestle said.
articles.content:
A massive 12-ton shipment of Nestle's crunch KitKat bars was stolen in a chocolaty heist that risks causing a shortage in stores right before Easter.
KitKat, owned by Swiss food giant Nestle, told A… [+1349 chars]
